hero.title: Nabeeh: Smart Teaching Assistant for Tutors
hero.subtitle: Nabeeh is a bilingual (AR/EN) teaching assistant with WhatsApp bot for student management, attendance tracking, grade management, and automated parent communication. Built for private tutors and tutoring centers in Egypt.

problem.title: Why tutors switch from spreadsheets to Nabeeh
problem.subtitle: Teaching assistants spend 5+ hours per week on administrative tasks. Nabeeh reduces this to under 1 hour.

spreadsheets.title: Spreadsheet errors cost time
spreadsheets.description: Manual attendance and grade tracking in Excel leads to calculation errors, version conflicts, and 3-5 hours of weekly data entry.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp messages create noise
whatsapp.description: Parents send 20+ daily messages asking about attendance, grades, and schedules. Each requires a manual lookup and response.

tracking.title: No early warning system
tracking.description: Without real-time data, tutors discover at-risk students 2-3 weeks late, after they've already fallen behind.

solution.title: Nabeeh: one platform for everything
solution.description: Nabeeh replaces spreadsheets, WhatsApp groups, and manual reports with a unified teaching assistant. Attendance, grades, and parent communication — all connected.

features.title: What Nabeeh offers
features.subtitle: Nabeeh handles student management, attendance, grades, and parent communication in one platform.

attendance.title: Attendance Tracking
attendance.description: Nabeeh lets you mark attendance in seconds with bulk entry. Track patterns and identify at-risk students automatically.

grades.title: Grade Management
grades.description: Nabeeh supports all assessment types — quizzes, midterms, finals, homework. Enter grades, calculate averages, and generate reports.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Bot
whatsapp.description: Nabeeh's WhatsApp bot answers parent queries about attendance, grades, and schedules automatically — no manual responses needed.

communication.title: Parent Communication
communication.description: Nabeeh sends updates, reports, and announcements to parents directly through WhatsApp in Arabic or English.

reports.title: Performance Reports
reports.description: Nabeeh generates visual dashboards showing student progress, attendance trends, and grade distributions.

groups.title: Multi-Group Management
groups.description: Nabeeh manages multiple classes, subjects, and student groups from a single dashboard with scheduling and capacity limits.

screenshots.title: See Nabeeh in action
screenshots.subtitle: A clean, intuitive interface designed for teachers.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when you're ready.

free.name: Basic
free.description: Perfect for individual tutors getting started.

center.name: Center
center.description: For tutoring centers with multiple teachers.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Nabeeh.

what.question: What is Nabeeh?
what.answer: Nabeeh is a bilingual (AR/EN) smart teaching assistant for private tutors and tutoring centers. Nabeeh manages attendance, grades, student information, and parent communication via WhatsApp — all in one platform.

whatsapp.question: How does the Nabeeh WhatsApp integration work?
whatsapp.answer: Parents send messages to your Nabeeh WhatsApp number asking about their child's attendance, grades, or schedule. Nabeeh's bot automatically responds with the relevant information from your database in under 5 seconds.

pricing.question: Is Nabeeh free?
pricing.answer: Yes. Nabeeh's free tier includes up to 20 students, 1 group, attendance tracking, grade management, and the WhatsApp bot. Premium tiers with unlimited students and advanced features are coming soon.

setup.question: How long does it take to set up Nabeeh?
setup.answer: Setting up Nabeeh takes about 5 minutes. Create an account, add your students and groups, and start tracking. No technical knowledge required.

data.question: Is my data secure on Nabeeh?
data.answer: Nabeeh uses Supabase (PostgreSQL) with enterprise-grade security, JWT authentication, encrypted data storage, and Row Level Security. Your students' information is protected and never shared with third parties.

support.question: Does Nabeeh support Arabic?
support.answer: Yes. Nabeeh is fully bilingual (Arabic and English). You can switch between languages at any time, and the WhatsApp bot responds in both languages.

comparison.title: Why tutors choose Nabeeh over spreadsheets
comparison.subtitle: Spreadsheets were not designed for teaching management. Nabeeh was built specifically for tutors.
comparison.note: Spreadsheets are general-purpose tools. Nabeeh is purpose-built for teaching management.

footer.tagline: Smart teaching assistant for private tutors.

Here's Ahmed's attendance this week:

📅 Sunday: ✅ Present
📅 Monday: ✅ Present
📅 Tuesday: ❌ Absent
📅 Wednesday: ✅ Present
📅 Thursday: ✅ Present

Attendance rate: 80%

Here are Ahmed's recent grades:

📝 Midterm Math: 85/100 (A)
📝 Quiz Science: 92/100 (A+)
📝 Homework English: 78/100 (B+)

Overall average: 85%
